title: Blue Wyrm
description:
Your wife - the Blue Knight Lucia did not return home from her journey to slay an ancient evil. Odd beings wreck havoc on the lands nearby. A rumor of a crypt unearthing is spread.

Find her in the crypt of the Blue Wyrm.Blue Wyrm is a first-person skill-based action game, where you take upon the role of the Red Knight Gabriel, armed only with her trusty sword to fight off a tight, but varied roster of enemies in a nonsensical surreal dungeon. Learn the ways to use your movement and position, directional attack variety and timing to perfect your battle technique and succeed in your quest to save her.

• The game is 60~ minutes long and is not recommended for people suffering with Epilepsy.

• It includes a speedrun mode.

• There are secret rooms to find.
description_short: Blue Wyrm is a psychedelic first-person souls-like with a retro aesthetic and skill-heavy combat system. Do you have what it takes to save your wife in the crypt of the Blue Wyrm?
